programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Wildlife series. Steve and the crew visit the southern states of the USA in search of more predators to add to his Deadly list.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Wildlife series. Steve Backshall takes a look at some of the super skills and senses that animals around the world use to hunt and survive.

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The nine designers storm a medieval-style castle to turn hotel bedrooms into perfect love nests, drawing on their own ideas of what makes a romantic retreat.

programme.title: The Idaho Murders: Trial By TikTok
programme.desc: Zara is in Idaho, USA, where four student murders sparked a global online obsession. Contains some strong language and upsetting scenes.

programme.title: Candyman
programme.desc: A gentrified neighbourhood is terrorised by a murderous figure of urban legend. Contains very strong language and graphic violent scenes.

programme.title: Chaos Walking
programme.desc: 2257. Teen Todd finds crash survivor Viola near his colony world community without women. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Growing Up Gypsy
programme.desc: Stacey meets three young English Romany Gypsy women taking on life's biggest moments. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Fake Friend: The Ticket Scammer
programme.desc: Unmasking the Somerset high-flyer who conned his school friends and hundreds more. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The Idaho Murders: Trial by TikTok
programme.desc: Zara is in Idaho, USA, where four student murders sparked a global online obsession. Contains some strong language and upsetting scenes.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: A look at the richest seas on earth, with epic spectacles and startling animal behaviour.

programme.title: Freddie Flintoff's Field of Dreams: On Tour
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff returns, two years after transforming the lives of teenagers in Preston.

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Twenty players enter a grand palace, with one chilling warning: trust no-one. Who among them will become the deceitful Traitors? The game begins..

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the players grapple with the aftermath of a shocking murder.

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The players must try to secure the coveted shield - the only protection against murder.

programme.title: Better Date Than Never
programme.desc: Charles is off to a bumpy start, and Olivia is left speechless after meeting her latest match. Meanwhile, Nirvali debriefs with her family, and Dianne gets a pep talk from her mum.

programme.title: Better Date Than Never
programme.desc: A phone call sets Olivia's heart racing, Charles gets back on the horse, and Nirvali opens up. Meanwhile, 20-year-old Liv already has her wedding planned but needs to find her groom.

programme.title: Matthew Perry and the Ketamine Queen
programme.desc: Documentary examining actor Matthew Perry's death and Hollywood's ketamine drug network. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Fake Friend: The Ticket Scammer
programme.desc: Unmasking the Somerset high-flyer who conned his school friends and hundreds more. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Brothers Steve and Stu scramble to put on a last-minute birthday show for Steve's daughter. If they fail, Steve's in the doghouse and Stu might end up... dead. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Thames View
programme.desc: Welcome to the Thames View Estate, home of the chaotic Potts family. 1990s-set animated comedy. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to Zambia for the first time. He hears hippo communication on a whole new level, spots a high-diving croc and meets some incredible sniffer dogs.
